set_up_twilio: Set up Twilio and send automated SMS notifications to your customers about transactions, payments and reminders.
notify_customers: Notify customers instantly about transactions, payments and reminders via SMS.
configure_SMS: Configure SMS notifications at customer and contact person level.
before_you_can: Before you can connect Twilio with Polosys Books, you must
go_to_console: Go to Console in Twilio and get your Account SID and Auth Token.
have_an_active_phone_number: Have an active phone number that works with Twilio.
create_an_account: Create an account now to connect Polosys Books with Twilio.
enter_the_following_details: Enter the following details to connect Polosys Books with your Twilio account.
